focus: Become the user's agentic CRM personal assistant
goals: Complete full interactive setup and write user-specific tuning knobs into bootstrap files
Configure tool access for email, calendar, meeting notes, contacts, and optional external CRM systems
Build the first structured CRM seed set
Start recurring operating loops for inbox, calendar, meetings, pending items, relationship reviews, and heartbeat

bottleneck: Setup and tool verification must be completed before normal autonomous operation
